prompt.content:
You are a spatial reasoning assistant analyzing a 3D scene image.
You will receive a list of objects visible in the image and a set of distance comparison questions.

For each question, compare 3D distances — either between two pairs of objects,
or from a common anchor object to two candidate objects.
Answer with exactly one of: "<" (first pair/candidate closer), "~=" (approximately equal), ">" (first pair/candidate farther).

Respond ONLY with a JSON array. Each element must have "qid" and "answer" (a string: "<", "~=", or ">").

Example:
[{"qid": "qrr_0001", "answer": "<"}, {"qid": "qrr_0002", "answer": "~="}]

content.text:
Objects in the image:
  - obj_0: small yellow metal cube
  - obj_1: small brown metal sphere
  - obj_2: large brown rubber cylinder
  - obj_3: small green rubber cylinder
  - obj_4: large red metal cylinder
  - obj_5: large yellow metal cylinder
  - obj_6: small purple metal cube
  - obj_7: small cyan rubber cylinder
  - obj_8: small yellow metal sphere

Questions:
[qrr_0141] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_2. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0142] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_3. Answer: < / ~= / >

[qrr_0145] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0146] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_3. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0147] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0148] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0149] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0150] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0151] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0152] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0153] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0154] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0155] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0156] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0157] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >

[qrr_0159] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0160] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >

raw_response:
I need to analyze the 4 different scene images and determine object positions to answer distance comparison questions.

Looking at the images, I need to identify the objects consistently:
- obj_0: small yellow metal cube
- obj_1: small brown metal sphere
- obj_2: large brown rubber cylinder
- obj_3: small green rubber cylinder
- obj_4: large red metal cylinder
- obj_5: large yellow metal cylinder
- obj_6: small purple metal cube
- obj_7: small cyan rubber cylinder
- obj_8: small yellow metal sphere

From the images, I need to estimate 3D positions. Looking at the last image which seems most complete:

- obj_5 (large yellow cylinder): left side, middle depth
- obj_3 (green cylinder): left-center, front
- obj_4 (red cylinder): center
- obj_1 (brown sphere): front-center
- obj_2 (large brown cylinder): back
- obj_0 (yellow cube): right-center
- obj_6 (purple cube): far right
- obj_7 (cyan cylinder): right, middle
- obj_8 (yellow sphere): front-right area

Distance between obj_0 and obj_8: yellow cube to yellow sphere - they appear relatively close, maybe ~2-3 units apart.

Now comparing:
- obj_1 to obj_2: brown sphere to large brown cylinder - moderate distance
- obj_1 to obj_3: brown sphere to green cylinder - moderate
- obj_1 to obj_5: brown sphere to yellow cylinder - moderate
- obj_1 to obj_6: brown sphere to purple cube - moderate to large
- obj_1 to obj_7: brown sphere to cyan cylinder - moderate
- obj_2 to obj_3: large brown cylinder to green cylinder - large
- obj_2 to obj_4: brown cylinder to red cylinder - moderate to large
- obj_2 to obj_5: brown cylinder to yellow cylinder - moderate to large
- obj_2 to obj_6: brown cylinder to purple cube - large
- obj_2 to obj_7: brown cylinder to cyan cylinder - moderate
- obj_3 to obj_4: green to red - small
- obj_3 to obj_5: green to yellow large - small to moderate
- obj_3 to obj_6: green to purple - moderate to large
- obj_3 to obj_7: green to cyan - moderate
- obj_4 to obj_5: red to yellow large - moderate
- obj_4 to obj_6: red to purple - moderate
- obj_4 to obj_7: red to cyan - moderate
- obj_5 to obj_6: yellow large to purple - moderate to large
- obj_5 to obj_7: yellow large to cyan - moderate
- obj_6 to obj_7: purple to cyan - small
